name: FeedScorer

neutralConcepts: score=0 passes through — zero score is lowest relevance NOT a drop condition
All scoring weights from FREEDOM config — no hardcoded 0.x constants
Output { feedItemId, score } for EVERY input item regardless of score
T78 applies delivery thresholds from FREEDOM config — not T77

ironRules.rule: score=0 passes through to T78 — zero score is lowest relevance, not a filtered item. Any code path that drops or skips score=0 items = BUILD_FAILURE
All scoring weights come from FREEDOM config — no hardcoded numeric constants (0.x weights = BUILD_FAILURE)
Output { feedItemId, score } for EVERY input item — T77 is a scorer, not a gate

keywords: feed scorer T77 zero score passthrough no filter FREEDOM config weights DATA_PIPELINE
